Distribution of Psychiatric Diagnoses in Denmark municipalities from 2013 to 2023

Distribution of Psychiatric Diagnoses in Denmark municipalities from 2013 to 2023

  • Both authors contributed equally to this code.
  • Load spatial and psychiatric data
  • Map diagnoses across Denmark
    • Percentage change maps
  • Spatial autocorrelation
    • K-nearest neighbour
    • Moran’s I tests

Frederikke Lykke Korreborg & Nanna Klitgaard Damgaard

06 June 2026 updated May 28, 2026

Both authors contributed equally to this code.

Load spatial and psychiatric data

df_total <- readRDS("df_total.rds")
df_reg <- readRDS("df_reg.rds")
df_adhd <- readRDS("df_adhd.rds")
df_autism <- readRDS("df_autism.rds")

# Get hospitals
gs4_deauth() # if the authentication is not working for you
hospitals <- read_sheet("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1xsQhjXOXMgs5R-Py57zJf4n6zH6pGpBJg8roBoSC02Y/edit?gid=0#gid=0",
                     range = "Ark1",
                     col_types = "ccnn")

# Convert hospitals to sf points
hospitals_sf <- st_as_sf(
  hospitals,
  coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"),
  crs = 4326)

Map diagnoses across Denmark

total_palette  <- colorRampPalette(c("#f7fbff", "#0b3c5d"))
adhd_palette   <- colorRampPalette(c("#f7f7fb", "#4a3f8c"))
autism_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#f7fbf7", "#0b5d4a"))
breaks <- seq(26, 101, by = 15) # make sure scales on legends are the same

# Plot of total diagnoses per 1000 children for 2013 by municipality
map2013 <- tm_shape(df_total) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2013",
    palette = total_palette(2),
    title = " ",
    colorNA = "#4F4F4F",
    breaks = breaks) +
  tm_credits("Municipalities with missing data: \nLæsø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_title("Diagnoses per 1000 Children by Municipality (2013)")
map2013

# Plot of total diagnoses per 1000 children for 2023 by municipality 
map2023 <- tm_shape(df_total) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2023",
    palette = total_palette(2),
    title = " ",
    textNA = "",
    breaks = breaks) +
  tm_title("Diagnoses per 1000 Children by Municipality (2023)")
map2023

Percentage change maps

# Plot of total percentage change from 2013 to 2023 (all diagnoses) by municipality 
rest_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("#f7f7f7", "#0b3c5d"))(6)
custom_palette <- c("#FFF1B8", rest_palette)

map_total_pct <- tm_shape(df_total) +
  tm_polygons(
    "pct_change",
    palette = custom_palette,
    colorNA = "#4F4F4F",
    title = "% change") +
  tm_credits("Municipalities with missing data: \nLæsø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_title("Percentage Change in Diagnoses From 2013 to 2023 by Municipality")
map_total_pct

# Plot of total diagnoses per 1000 children for 2013 region
breaks <- seq(30, 72, by = 10)

map2013_reg <- tm_shape(df_reg) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2013",
    palette = total_palette(2),
    title = " ",
    textNA = "",
    breaks = breaks) +
  # Add hospital points
  tm_shape(hospitals_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    size = 0.8,
    col = "indianred",
    border.col = "black",
    shape = 20) +
  tm_title("Diagnoses per 1000 Children by Region (2013)")
map2013_reg

# Plot of total diagnoses per 1000 children for 2023 by municipality 
map2023_reg <- tm_shape(df_reg) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2023",
    palette = total_palette(2),
    title = " ",
    textNA = "",
    breaks = breaks) +
  # Add hospital points
  tm_shape(hospitals_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    size = 0.8,
    col = "indianred",
    border.col = "black",
    shape = 20) +
  tm_title("Diagnoses per 1000 Children by Region (2023)")
map2023_reg

# Plot of total percentage change from 2013 to 2023 (all diagnoses) by region
breaks <- seq(25, 85, by = 15)
map_reg_pct <- tm_shape(df_reg) +
  tm_polygons(
    "pct_change",
    palette = total_palette(2),
    textNA = "",
    title = "% change",
    breaks = breaks) +
  # Add hospital points
  tm_shape(hospitals_sf) +
  tm_symbols(
    size = 0.8,
    col = "indianred",
    border.col = "black",
    shape = 20) +
  tm_title("Percentage Change in Diagnoses From 2013 to 2023 by Region")
map_reg_pct

breaks <- seq(0, 60, by = 10)

# Plot of ADHD diagnoses per 1000 children for 2013 and 2023 by municipality 
map2013_adhd <- tm_shape(df_adhd) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2013",
    palette = adhd_palette(2),
    breaks = breaks,
    colorNA = "#4F4F4F",
    title = " ") +
  tm_credits("Municipalities with missing data: \nLæsø, Fanø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_title("ADHD Diagnoses per 1000 Children (2013)")
map2013_adhd

map2023_adhd <- tm_shape(df_adhd) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2023",
    palette = adhd_palette(2),
    breaks = breaks,
    colorNA = "#4F4F4F",
    title = " ") +
  tm_credits("Municipalities with missing data: \nÆrø, Langeland",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_title("ADHD Diagnoses per 1000 Children (2023)")
map2023_adhd

# Plot of Autism diagnoses per 1000 children for 2013 and 2023 by municipality 
map2013_autism <- tm_shape(df_autism) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2013",
    palette = autism_palette(2),
    breaks = breaks,
    colorNA = "#4F4F4F",
    title = " ") +
  tm_credits("Municipalities with missing data: \nLæsø, Fanø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_title("Autism Diagnoses per 1000 Children (2013)")
map2013_autism

map2023_autism <- tm_shape(df_autism) +
  tm_polygons(
    "2023",
    palette = autism_palette(2),
    breaks = breaks,
    colorNA = "#4F4F4F",
    title = " ") +
  tm_credits("Municipalities with missing data: \nLæsø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_title("Autism Diagnoses per 1000 Children (2023)")
map2023_autism

Spatial autocorrelation

K-nearest neighbour

# Subset municipalities with valid data
missing_total <- df_total %>%
  filter(if_any("2013":"2023", is.na)) %>%
  distinct(NAME_2)
missing_total #Print which municipalities have missing data
  NAME_2
1   Læsø
df_total_clean <- df_total %>% filter(!NAME_2 %in% missing_total$NAME_2)

# Create centroids
centroids <- st_centroid(df_total_clean)

# Coordinates
coords <- st_coordinates(centroids)

# kNN neighbours
nb_knn <- knearneigh(coords, k = 5)
nb <- knn2nb(nb_knn)

# Convert neighbour links to sf object
nb_lines <- nb2lines(nb, coords = coords, as_sf = TRUE)

# Map
knn_map <- 
  tm_shape(df_total) +
  tm_polygons(col = "#DCEFD8", border.col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +
  tm_shape(nb_lines) +
  tm_lines(col = "#2C7FB8", lwd = 1) +
  tm_shape(centroids) +
  tm_symbols(col = "#1B4332", size = 0.4) +
  tm_credits("Excluded municipalities: \nLæsø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_layout(
    main.title = "K-Nearest Neighbour Network (k = 5)",
    main.title.size = 1)

knn_map

# Subset municipalities with valid data
missing_adhd <- df_adhd %>%
  filter(if_any("2013":"2023", is.na)) %>%
  distinct(NAME_2)
missing_adhd #Print which municipalities have missing data
# A tibble: 4 × 1
  NAME_2   
  <chr>    
1 Læsø     
2 Ærø      
3 Fanø     
4 Langeland
df_adhd_clean <- df_adhd %>% filter(!NAME_2 %in% missing_adhd$NAME_2)


# Create centroids
adhd_centroids <- st_centroid(df_adhd_clean)

# Coordinates
adhd_coords <- st_coordinates(adhd_centroids)

# kNN neighbours
adhd_nb_knn <- knearneigh(adhd_coords, k = 5)
adhd_nb <- knn2nb(adhd_nb_knn)

# Convert neighbour links to sf object
adhd_nb_lines <- nb2lines(adhd_nb, coords = adhd_coords, as_sf = TRUE)

# Map
adhd_knn_map <- 
  tm_shape(df_adhd_clean) +
  tm_polygons(col = "#DCEFD8", border.col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +
  tm_shape(adhd_nb_lines) +
  tm_lines(col = "#2C7FB8", lwd = 1) +
  tm_shape(adhd_centroids) +
  tm_symbols(col = "#1B4332", size = 0.4) +
  tm_credits("Excluded municipalities: \nLæsø, Ærø, Fanø, Langeland",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_layout(
    main.title = "K-Nearest Neighbour Network (k = 5) for ADHD dataset",
    main.title.size = 1)

adhd_knn_map

# Subset municipalities with valid data
missing_au <- df_autism %>%
  filter(if_any("2013":"2023", is.na)) %>%
  distinct(NAME_2)
missing_au #Print which municipalities have missing data
# A tibble: 2 × 1
  NAME_2
  <chr> 
1 Læsø  
2 Fanø  
df_au_clean <- df_autism %>% filter(!NAME_2 %in% missing_au$NAME_2)


# Create centroids
au_centroids <- st_centroid(df_au_clean)

# Coordinates
au_coords <- st_coordinates(au_centroids)

# kNN neighbours
au_nb_knn <- knearneigh(au_coords, k = 5)
au_nb <- knn2nb(au_nb_knn)

# Convert neighbour links to sf object
au_nb_lines <- nb2lines(au_nb, coords = au_coords, as_sf = TRUE)

# Map
au_knn_map <- 
  tm_shape(df_au_clean) +
  tm_polygons(col = "#DCEFD8", border.col = "white", lwd = 0.3) +
  tm_shape(au_nb_lines) +
  tm_lines(col = "#2C7FB8", lwd = 1) +
  tm_shape(au_centroids) +
  tm_symbols(col = "#1B4332", size = 0.4) +
  tm_credits("Excluded municipalities: \nLæsø, Fanø",
             position = c("right", "top"),
             size = 0.8) +
  tm_layout(
    main.title = "K-Nearest Neighbour Network (k = 5) for Autism dataset",
    main.title.size = 1)

au_knn_map

Moran’s I tests

Total 2013, 2023, and pct change

# Row-standardised weights
lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

# 2013 MORAN'S I TEST
y_2013 <- df_total_clean$"2013"
moran.test(y_2013, lw, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Moran I test under randomisation

data:  y_2013  
weights: lw    

Moran I statistic standard deviate = 9.5473, p-value < 2.2e-16
alternative hypothesis: greater
sample estimates:
Moran I statistic       Expectation          Variance 
      0.541653605      -0.010416667       0.003343687 
moran.mc(y_2013, lw, nsim = 999, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Monte-Carlo simulation of Moran I

data:  y_2013 
weights: lw  
number of simulations + 1: 1000 

statistic = 0.54165, observed rank = 1000, p-value = 0.001
alternative hypothesis: greater
# 2023 MORAN'S I TEST
y_2023 <- df_total_clean$"2023"
moran.test(y_2023, lw, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Moran I test under randomisation

data:  y_2023  
weights: lw    

Moran I statistic standard deviate = 4.1907, p-value = 1.391e-05
alternative hypothesis: greater
sample estimates:
Moran I statistic       Expectation          Variance 
      0.231330676      -0.010416667       0.003327823 
moran.mc(y_2023, lw, nsim = 999, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Monte-Carlo simulation of Moran I

data:  y_2023 
weights: lw  
number of simulations + 1: 1000 

statistic = 0.23133, observed rank = 1000, p-value = 0.001
alternative hypothesis: greater
# PCT MORAN'S I TEST
y_pct <- df_total_clean$pct_change
moran.test(y_pct, lw, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Moran I test under randomisation

data:  y_pct  
weights: lw    

Moran I statistic standard deviate = 8.9742, p-value < 2.2e-16
alternative hypothesis: greater
sample estimates:
Moran I statistic       Expectation          Variance 
      0.507154346      -0.010416667       0.003326205 
moran.mc(y_pct, lw, nsim = 999, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Monte-Carlo simulation of Moran I

data:  y_pct 
weights: lw  
number of simulations + 1: 1000 

statistic = 0.50715, observed rank = 1000, p-value = 0.001
alternative hypothesis: greater

ADHD 2013, 2023, and pct change

# Row-standardised weights
adhd_lw <- nb2listw(adhd_nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)

# ADHD 2013 MORAN'S I TEST
y_adhd_2013 <- df_adhd_clean$"2013"
moran.test(y_adhd_2013, adhd_lw, zero.policy = TRUE)

    Moran I test under randomisation

data:  y_adhd_2013  
weights: adhd_lw    

Moran I statistic standard deviate = 6.9424, p-value = 1.928e-12
alternative hypothesis: greater

      0.392724277      -0.010752688       0.003377689

weights: adhd_lw

alternative hypothesis: greater

    Monte-Carlo simulation of Moran I

data:  y_au_pct 
weights: au_lw  
number of simulations + 1: 1000 

statistic = 0.32333, observed rank = 1000, p-value = 0.001
alternative hypothesis: greater
# Plot to show distance to nearest hospital by municipality

# Project to metric CRS
df_total_proj <- st_transform(df_total, 32632)
hospitals_proj <- st_transform(hospitals_sf, 32632)

# Get centroids
muni_centroids <- st_centroid(df_total_proj)

# Distance to hospitals
dist_matrix <- st_distance(muni_centroids, hospitals_proj)

# Find nearest hospitals
df_total_proj$nearest_hospital_m <- apply(dist_matrix, 1, min)
df_total_proj$nearest_hospital_km <-as.numeric(df_total_proj$nearest_hospital_m) / 1000

nearest_idx <- apply(dist_matrix, 1, which.min)
df_total_proj$nearest_hospital <-hospitals_proj$Placename[nearest_idx]

df_total_proj %>% 
  st_drop_geometry() %>% 
  select(NAME_2, nearest_hospital_m, nearest_hospital_km, nearest_hospital) %>% 
  head()
       NAME_2 nearest_hospital_m nearest_hospital_km nearest_hospital
1 Albertslund           2561.457            2.561457         Glostrup
2     Allerød          20771.453           20.771453         Glostrup
3    Ballerup           6962.029            6.962029         Glostrup
4    Bornholm         171080.377          171.080377         Glostrup
5     Brøndby           3672.832            3.672832         Glostrup
6      Dragør          17750.798           17.750798         Glostrup
breaks <- seq(0, 175, by = 35)
tm_shape(df_total_proj) +
  tm_polygons(
    "nearest_hospital_km",
    palette = total_palette(2),
    title = "Distance (km)",
    breaks = breaks,
    textNA = "") +
  tm_shape(hospitals_proj) +
  tm_symbols(
    shape = 20,
    col = "indianred",
    border.col = "white",
    size = 0.7) +
  tm_title("Distance to Nearest Psychiatric Hospital by Municipality")
